content:
Hi, I’m Denis. I’m an offensive security engineer with roughly 7 years of experience spent entirely in offsec in a positions ranging from pentester up to the management across multiple countries.
I’ve decided to start this blog to hopefully share with the community that is given me so much over the years.
It’s quite empty in here, but fret not:
I plan to publish weekly-ish, if i have non-technical topics to discuss, and monthly-ish for technical topics. I also plan to slowly move away from default PaperMod and customize it to my liking. As a disclaimer, all written is my personal opinion and does not represent or related to any of my current or past employers.
I will be glad if you stick around via RSS or a bookmark.
Some topics im planning to write about:
Cybersecurity Offensive security Red Teaming Cloud and AI You can find additional links that will take you to my LinkedIn, Github or X on the main page.
You could also visit my main site to see my other personal projects.
Thanks for sticking by.
summary: Offensive security engineer writing about cybersecurity, red teaming, cloud, and AI.
title: About
